seed_notes: Run 'python enrichment/seed_sio.py' to populate from catalog.ucsd.edu and profiles.ucsd.edu. The catalog page (https://catalog.ucsd.edu/faculty/SIO.html) lists faculty names and titles but provides no further details. The seed script uses multiple strategies: (1) scrape the catalog page, (2) search profiles.ucsd.edu by department, (3) cross-validate between sources.

enrichment_sources.name: nsf_awards
enrichment_sources.description: NSF Award Search API (dominant funder for ocean sciences)

enrichment_sources.name: nih_reporter
enrichment_sources.description: NIH RePORTER API (some SIO faculty have NIH funding)
